completed_tasks.name: Stabilise bounded source refill and recovery paths
Verify code and align Zoro runtime
Refill Light and Cop source buffers and run fresh shadow 1x3
completed_tasks.progress: Dark is at 12 qualified sources; Light is at 2 and Cop at 1. A hash-bound reserve-catalog implementation is committed, but its private catalog has not been populated or executed.

remaining_tasks.name: Deploy exact current commit and complete controlled live 1x3 then 2x3
Make next-ready, arm daemon/refiller, and observe natural scheduled wake

blockers.description: Production source buffer is not ready: Light has 2 and Cop has 1 qualified source, below the minimum of 6.
blockers.workaround: Build a private mode-0600 reserve catalog from the stored Ask/Instagram research, run bounded execute through all gates, and verify server counts before any shadow.

blockers.description: Render is still live on 008216e. The latest tested commit 6d93bda is pushed and installed on Zoro but has not been deployed to Render.
blockers.workaround: Use the already authenticated Render dashboard to manually deploy exact commit 6d93bda; verify Live before starting a shadow run.

decisions.decision: The public MVP remains three new public_verified Shorts on each of Dark JoyBoy, THE LIGHT KINGDOM, and COP SCOPES.
decisions.rationale: This is the owner's explicit public outcome; no source, build, deployment, or shadow milestone closes the task.

decisions.decision: Use a bounded, hash-bound reserve catalog only as the bootstrap source path for the current Light/Cop deficit.
decisions.rationale: It preserves the existing decode, OCR/ASR, duplicate, policy, Source Fit, and idempotent upload gates without building a general browser automation layer before the first working cycle.

decisions.decision: Do not ask the owner for approvals during this handoff execution.
decisions.rationale: The continuous execution authorization already covers exact profile promotion, bounded live 3x3, source replenishment, daemon/refiller arm, and the first natural wake.

uncommitted_files: experiments/ (user-owned research evidence; preserve and never stage/delete as cleanup)
next_action: Read .planning/.continue-here.md, then turn the stored Light Ask and Cop research into a mode-0600 hash-bound reserve catalog on Zoro; run the bounded execute refiller and independently verify all three source-buffer counts before touching profiles or publications.
context_notes: No public video or upload identity was created. The earlier shadow run 55186e0f0f9c48a7968cae94fe1e8d37 is durable failure evidence only: it ended blocked, never published, and exposed the buffer deficit that this handoff addresses.
